messages.author: them
messages.text: Please tell me that "can everyone stop replying all" was meant for work and not our family group

messages.author: them
messages.text: You sent it right after Aunt Leena shared 14 photos of her air fryer

messages.author: me
messages.text: In my defense, photo 9 was somehow also photo 3

messages.author: them
messages.text: Dad replied "Agreed" and now Aunt Leena has left the group

messages.author: me
messages.text: I can fix this. I'll say I was talking about work stress spilling over.

messages.author: them
messages.text: Too late. She made a new group called "People Who Appreciate Crispy Things"

messages.author: them
messages.text: No. Dad is. He just sent "Agreed" there too.
